# Bodhi Surf Knowledge Pack v1

A governed general surf-domain knowledge pack for Quivrr's Bodhi Board Guide.

## Contents

- 20 structured knowledge JSON files
- human-readable surf-shop handbook
- integration guide
- Codex implementation brief
- focused regression scenarios
- schema and example decision record
- SHA-256 manifest

## Important boundary

This pack contains general surfing and surfboard-selection knowledge. It does not replace Quivrr's canonical model facts, official manufacturer descriptions, exact dimensions, live inventory, pricing or regional stock data.

## Generated files

Total files before this README and manifest refresh: 26

## Recommended use

Import this as a separate governed domain layer, validate at startup, and use deterministic rules before LLM prose.
